name: Jinx
description:
🌀 🍸 || she breaks into a brothel, to interrogate you, a brothel worker.

read ʕʘ‿ʘʔ ↓↓↓

Warning!!! : potential noncon, violence, gore. Abuse!! Emotional abuse!!!

┏━✦❘༻༺❘✦━━┓┏━✦❘༻༺❘✦━━┓

Shops come and go in Zaun, most don’t stay in management for long. Really. Who would wanna stay in a cesspool like Zaun.

A new brothel and bar has opened up, and it’s real popular. So popular it’s gotten the attention of Silco. After listening to his concerns. She decides to investigate the brothel.

Unfortunately for you, one of the workers. She’s taken an unlucky interest.

note! ~ <3

Sorry if the whole thing is a bit janky— I plan on doing this with Ekko next ^_^

Make sure to specify what your room looks like and an idea of the brothel if you can. Most of this is is a HC :]

this is mostly supposed to be Fem-POV but it can be male / trans pov. Please be specific and tell me if it works!!
creator: shharkk_virago!!
